Article.ArticleTitle: Recent Advances in Urinometers: Enhancing Monitoring of Urine Output, pH, and Color: A Narrative Review.

Abstract.AbstractText: Recent technological advancements have transformed traditional urinometry, leading to enhanced devices that provide continuous and accurate monitoring of urine output, pH, and colour. Such improvements are vital in clinical settings where precise urine monitoring aids in assessing hydration status, kidney function, and acid-base balance. This narrative review explores the latest innovations in urinometer technology, covering enhanced digital sensors, real-time data analytics, and automated reporting features. Key focus areas include improvements in device accuracy, integration with electronic health systems, and implications for patient care. Additionally, challenges and future directions for urinometer innovation are discussed.
Abstract.CopyrightInformation: Copyright: © 2025 Journal of Pharmacy and Bioallied Sciences.
